sections.content: Employee Provident Fund: 12% of basic salary contributed by employee + 12% by employer. Of employer share, 8.33% goes to EPS (pension) and 3.67% to EPF. Mandatory for establishments with 20+ employees. Current interest rate: 8.25% (2023-24). UAN (Universal Account Number) is permanent ID across jobs.

Via unifiedportal-mem.epfindia.gov.in: (1) Check PF balance (passbook). (2) Claim PF withdrawal (Form 19). (3) Claim pension (Form 10D). (4) Transfer PF between jobs (Form 13). (5) Update KYC (Aadhaar/bank/PAN linking). (6) Download UAN card. Also via UMANG app or missed call to 011-22901406.

Full withdrawal: after 2 months of unemployment (with self-declaration). Partial: (1) Medical - 6x monthly salary. (2) Marriage - 50% of member share. (3) Education - 50%. (4) Housing - 36x salary for purchase, 12x for repair. (5) 1 year before retirement - 90%. Online claim via UAN portal, money in 3-7 days if KYC complete.

Eligible after 10 years of service. Monthly pension from age 58. Formula: (pensionable salary x pensionable service) / 70. Minimum pension: Rs 1,000/month. Early pension (age 50-58) at reduced rate. Family pension for dependents if member dies.
